background: For the scenarios presented here, identify the source population and sample as specifically as possible. If information is insufficient, do your best to provide a reasonable description of the population and sample and then suggest additional.

task.query: The sample consists of the 125 individuals in the study. The source population can be viewed as either (a) all patients that attended this hospital during the study period or (b) all individuals in the hospital's geographic capturement area, that is, the population who might have been hospitalized had there been a need.
task.answer: It would be useful to know additional information about these source populations, for example, the timeframe of the study, the demographic make-up of the capturement area, and so on.

task.query: The sample consists of the 18 diabetics in the study. The population consists of 35 to 44-year old male diabetics.
task.answer: It would be useful to know other person, place, and time factors that define the source population.
